# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-service-account
    displayName: Application Service Account
    description: Service account for application authentication
  access:
  - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
    members:
    - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator
    members:
    - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
- name: app-service-account-key
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccountKey
  properties:
    serviceAccountEmail: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
    keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_RSA_2048
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
  access:
  - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountKeyAdmin
    members:
    - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
- name: app-service-account-permissions
  type: iam.v1.policy
  properties:
    bindings:
    - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
    - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
    - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountKeyAdmin
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  access:
  - role: roles/iam.roleAdmin
    members:
    - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
- name: app-service-account-iam-policy
  type: iam.v1.policy
  properties:
    bindings:
    - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountUser
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
    - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
    - role: roles/iam.serviceAccountKeyAdmin
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
  access:
  - role: roles/iam.roleAdmin
    members:
    - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
- name: app-service-account-key-output
  type: gcp-types/deploymentmanager-v2:deploymentmanager.v2.deployment
  properties:
    deployment: app-service-account-key-deployment
    target:
      config:
        content: |
          resources:
          - name: app-service-account-key-file
            type: gcp-types/storage.v1.object
            properties:
              bucket: $(ref.app-service-account-key.bucket)
              name: app-service-account-key.json
              content: $(ref.app-service-account-key.privateKeyData)
              contentType: application/json
    access:
    - role: roles/storage.objectCreator
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
    - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
      members:
      - serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)
